2210510.name: Pneumata Demo
2210510.description:
Pneumata is a psychological survival horror in which you must run, fight, or hide. Put your investigative skills to the test and keep your composure as you explore the unknown evils of Clover Hill Apartments. Do what you must to survive, as the line between reality and alternate worlds begins to blur.

In this short demo, play as former detective David Hernandez as you wake up inside a medical room with no recollection of how you got there.

The tenants are going missing, the screams are getting louder, and the building itself keeps changing. There's a serial killer loose in the city of Milton. Investigate the mysterious rumors surrounding Clover Hill Apartments and discover the terrible secrets that lay beneath the surface.
2210510.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
